Bash(python -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\('WorthIQ Test Harness - Batch \(1\).csv'\)
b2 = df[df['batch_id'] == 'B-20260319-194340']
print\('Turns:', sorted\(b2['turn'].unique\(\)\)\)
print\('Question ID:', b2['question_id'].iloc[0]\)
print\('Question text \(first 500 chars\):'\)
print\(b2.loc[b2['turn']==1, 'question_text'].values[0][:500]\)
")
